description: A positive control with final answer and WP-CLI evidence for the actual homepage options.

environment.WP_GYM_FINAL_RESPONSE: I checked the site with wp option get show_on_front and wp option get page_on_front. show_on_front is posts and page_on_front is 0, so the homepage is showing latest posts/blog posts rather than a static front page. To fix it, set show_on_front to page/static and set page_on_front to the desired front page ID.
